surface_verification.justification: Data-only compliance reconciliation (audit_config.json g2_stoplist, shipwright_bloat_baseline.json current LOC, shipwright_events.jsonl B7 backfill + D3 amendment). No source/test/UI/API/store/WS/message-contract code changed; the two appended events carry no campaign metadata, so the webui campaign-board projection is unaffected. Verification is the detective-audit FAIL->PASS (B7/D3/G2/H2) + bloat anti-ratchet clean + JSON round-trip.

behaviors.behavior: B7 detective check passes: every commit since v0.21.0 has a matching event (dd7f7468 / PR #168 safeFit refactor was the lone gap)
behaviors.evidence: run_audit.py --only B B7 PASS: '16 commit(s) since v0.21.0 (7 excluded by Rules A/B/C, 9 matched events)'; dd7f7468 now SHA-matched by backfill event evt-82ac5b20 (affected_frs FR-01.28)

behaviors.behavior: D3 detective check passes: promised FR-01.42 (introduced via new_frs on evt-2646f4da) is reaffirmed in a same-or-later affected_frs
behaviors.evidence: run_audit.py --only D D3 PASS: 'every promised FR has a follow-up affected_frs event'; delivered via event_amended evt-8732b08e (affected_frs [FR-01.01, FR-01.42], preserving the BP-1 FR-01.01 backfill)

behaviors.behavior: G2 detective check passes: conventional-commit scopes 'mobile' (PR #174) and 'images' (PR #173) resolve against the g2_stoplist
behaviors.evidence: run_audit.py --only G G2 PASS: 'every conventional scope in 15 commit(s) resolves against alias-map / split / stoplist' after appending 'mobile','images' to audit_config.json

behaviors.behavior: H2 detective check passes and the bloat anti-ratchet stays clean: baseline current == on-disk LOC for the 4 over-recorded entries
behaviors.evidence: run_audit.py --only H H2 PASS: 'baseline current matches on-disk LOC for all entries' (TaskCard 552->543, ActionsConfigCard 408->86, externalApi 863->862, TaskBoardPage 650->441); scripts/hooks/anti_ratchet_check.py --worktree exit 0
